---
id: metadata-lifecycle-diagram
title: Metadata Lifecycle Diagram
owner: governance-steward
status: DRAFT
aspirational: true
---

# UIAO Metadata Lifecycle Diagram

## End-to-End Flow from Document Creation to Schema Evolution

---

## Mermaid Diagram

[DIAGRAM-01: Top-down lifecycle flowchart diagram with feedback loops. Linear top-to-bottom flow: Create Document → Add Metadata → CI Validation. From CI Validation a green-labeled "Pass" arrow leads down to "Publish"; a red-labeled "Fail" arrow loops back upward to "Add Metadata". Publish flows to "Drift Detection". From Drift Detection a green "No Drift" arrow loops back to Publish; a red "Drift Found" arrow leads down to "Drift Issue Created" → "Owner Acknowledgment" → "Remediation PR" → "CI Validation" (re-validation). The re-validation step has a "Pass" arrow leading down to "Merge + Resolve" and a "Fail" arrow looping back to "Remediation PR". Merge + Resolve flows down to "Dashboard Update" → "Quarterly Review" → "Schema Evolution", and Schema Evolution feeds a long curved feedback arrow all the way back up to "Add Metadata" closing the lifecycle. Engineering blueprint style with arrow labels colored green for pass / red for fail / amber for feedback, federal navy primary boxes, 16:9 landscape.]

---

## ASCII Diagram

```
Create --> Metadata --> CI --> Publish
                    |
                    Fail --> back to Metadata

Publish --> Drift Detection --> No Drift --> Publish
                            |
                            Drift --> Issue --> Acknowledge --> Remediate --> CI --> Merge --> Dashboard --> Quarterly Review --> Schema Evolution --> Metadata
```

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
